input:
import socket

target = input("Enter target IP: ")
ports = [21, 22, 23, 80, 443]

for port in ports:
    sock = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
    sock.settimeout(1)
    result = sock.connect_ex((target, port))
    
    if result == 0:
        print(f"Port {port} is OPEN")
    else:
        print(f"Port {port} is CLOSED")
    
    sock.close()
